payload.answer: Possible repair/user-choice options for this context statement:
citations: For context, I usually prefer to read technical papers in the morning before checking email.
repair_options: Record this as a standalone morning preference: reading technical papers before checking email.
Keep it as contextual background only, without changing any existing routine entries.
Treat it as an additive preference and ask whether it should be linked to a broader morning routine or remain separate.
If needed, clarify whether this is a strong preference, a frequent habit, or only an occasional pattern.
